seoTitle: Riverside Unified Calendar 2027-2028: Holidays, Breaks & PDF
seoDescription: Riverside Unified 2027-2028 calendar with Aug 9 classes begin, May 26 final grade-level end date, Thanksgiving, Winter Recess, Spring Recess, PDF and ICS.
calendarNotes: Riverside Unified classes begin on August 9, 2027. The calendar lists May 25, 2028 as the end of high school and 7th grade, and May 26, 2028 as the end of elementary and 8th grade and the last day for teachers.

calendarFaqs.q: When does Riverside Unified start school in 2027?
calendarFaqs.a: Classes begin on Monday, August 9, 2027. The first day for 7th grade is Friday, August 6, 2027.

calendarFaqs.q: When is Riverside Unified Spring Recess in 2028?
calendarFaqs.a: Spring Recess runs Monday, March 27 through Friday, March 31, 2028.

calendarFaqs.q: When is the last day of school for Riverside Unified in 2028?
calendarFaqs.a: High school and 7th grade end May 25, 2028. Elementary and 8th grade end May 26, 2028.

yearNumbers.label: Classes Begin
yearNumbers.detail: The general classes-begin date is August 9, 2027.

yearNumbers.label: Final Grade End Date
yearNumbers.detail: Elementary and 8th grade end May 26, after high school and 7th grade end May 25.
